# Re-engage open deals with MySQL and Discord on autopilot

**Pattern:** Reminders & Follow-ups · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Re-engage open deals with MySQL and Discord on autopilot. It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual booking is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Daily Schedule → Segment Audience → Step 1 — Welcome (Discord) → Wait Before Step 2 → Converted Already? → Step 2 — Value Nudge (Discord) → Update Drip Status → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to reminders & follow-ups without manual effort
- Anyone automating booking in healthcare
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Scales without extra headcount
- Removes copy-paste errors
- Standardizes the process every time

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Discord webhook URL; MySQL connection.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## ⏱ Rate limiting

Work is batched and spaced with Wait so provider quotas aren't tripped. If you hit 429s, lower the batch size or raise the wait — throughput drops, reliability rises.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your booking process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
